report.summary: UX audited 2 new learn pages from build cycle 4 (smart contract audit guide, DA comparison), fixed 4 schema/structured-data bugs, created 2 branded OG SVG images (1200x630), and noted mobile responsiveness tech debt.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: Fixed DA comparison page StructuredData prop: 'schema={schema}' changed to 'data={schema}' — JSON-LD would not have rendered without this fix
Fixed DA comparison page generateArticleSchema params: 'publishedDate'/'modifiedDate' corrected to 'datePublished'/'dateModified' — structured data would have been missing dates
Fixed DA comparison page author field: 'authors: ["degen0x"]' (array) corrected to 'author: "degen0x"' (string) — schema author would have been undefined
Fixed smart contract audit page generateArticleSchema: added missing 'author' and 'url' fields — structured data would have had undefined author and no canonical URL
Verified both pages use correct server component pattern (no 'use client' + metadata export conflict)
Verified both pages correctly import and render BackToTop component

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: og-smart-contract-audit-guide-2026.svg (1200x630) — Security category, red/amber/green gradient, shield+checkmark icon, OWASP Top 10 mini-table, $17B stat callout
OG image: og-da-comparison-2026.svg (1200x630) — Infrastructure category, three-column comparison (Celestia/EigenDA/Avail), purple/blue/cyan theme, key stats per solution

sections.title: Pages Audited
items: /learn/smart-contract-security-audit-guide-2026 — 2 fixes applied (missing author + url in generateArticleSchema)
/learn/data-availability-celestia-eigenda-avail-comparison-2026 — 3 fixes applied (StructuredData prop, schema param names, author field type)

sections.title: Technical Debt Noted
items: Both pages use inline styles rather than Tailwind — consistent with earlier build-4 pages but should be normalized in future sprint
Both pages use fixed fontSize: '48px' on h1 without responsive clamp() — will overflow on mobile (<375px screens)
Smart contract page uses <div> as root wrapper instead of semantic <main> + <article> (DA comparison page correctly uses <main> + <article>)
